vt_requirements.note: Every acceptance criterion or truth-state-advancing claim must record these four V&T fields.

title: C-RSP Build Contract — TLC Workbench Lifecycle
goal: Define the governed research-to-paper-to-product lifecycle the Workbench must implement.
objective: Require one coherent, resumable, evidence-backed lifecycle with persistent domain entities, explicit phase transitions, and a mandatory end-to-end operator flow in both surfaces.
required_outputs: Lifecycle phases for project intake through publication or registration.
Persistent domain entities for projects, sessions, claims, evidence, drafts, products, and recovery snapshots.
A mandatory end-to-end flow that starts with project creation and ends with product artifact generation.
Explicit halts for invalid advancement and missing traceability.

acceptance_criteria.statement: All lifecycle phases exist in code and state.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Domain state and services expose project intake through publication or registration phases.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Required domain entities exist and are persisted.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Persistent models exist for project, session, claim, evidence, draft, paper packet, product artifact, publication surface, and recovery snapshot.

acceptance_criteria.statement: The mandatory flow executes successfully in both surfaces.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Automated end-to-end evidence shows the required operator flow succeeds in TUI and Web UI.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Invalid advancement is blocked with an explicit halt reason.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Tests or policy checks emit named halt conditions when advancement rules are violated.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Paper packet generation references claims and evidence rather than free-floating text only.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Generated paper artifacts include traceable claim-to-evidence mappings.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Product artifact generation is linked to validated lifecycle state.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Productization outputs are only available from a validated or explicitly allowed lifecycle state.

halt_conditions.trigger: A project is created or advanced without defined scope or governing contract.
halt_conditions.resolution: Define project scope and contract before proceeding.

halt_conditions.trigger: A claim exists without the required evidence or lifecycle binding.
halt_conditions.resolution: Bind the claim to supporting evidence and lifecycle state.

halt_conditions.trigger: Lifecycle advancement is attempted without the required evidence posture.
halt_conditions.resolution: Attach the missing evidence and re-run validation before advancing.

halt_conditions.trigger: Paper drafting proceeds without claim or evidence traceability.
halt_conditions.resolution: Restore traceability from draft sections back to claims and evidence.

halt_conditions.trigger: Product artifact generation is attempted before the required validation phase is complete.
halt_conditions.resolution: Complete validation and produce the required evidence before productization.

evidence_requirements.description: End-to-end lifecycle evidence for the canonical operator flow.
Policy evidence for invalid advancement halts and traceability enforcement.
